description: Seaport Therapeutics, Inc. operates as a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company advancing the development of novel neuropsychiatric medicines. The company develops therapeutic candidates for conditions such as depression and anxiety disorders using its proprietary Glyph technology platform. The Glyph platform is designed to enable oral bioavailability, bypass first-pass metabolism, and reduce liver enzyme elevations or hepatotoxicity and other side effects. All therapeutic candidates in development are based on this platform, with research and development activities focused on neuropsychiatr
